title: Home
seoDescription: Heyford Park FC — boys' and girls' youth football in Heyford Park, Fritwell and Tackley. Ages 4–16. England Football Accredited.

blocks.title: Where every child finds their game.

children.text: Boys & girls football for ages 4–16. Built on Teamwork, Respect, and Inspire — right here in Heyford Park.

ctas.label: Join Us
ctas.sublabel: Find out if your child can play

blocks.title: A community club for every child who wants to play.

children.text: Founded in 2019, Heyford Park FC has grown to over 250 registered players across 20 teams, boys' and girls' from U7 to U16. We're a volunteer-run, England Football accredited club rooted in Heyford Park — and we've built our coaching around three values that come before any scoreline.

badge.title: England Football Accredited
badge.subtitle: Recognised standard of safe, quality grassroots football

cards.title: Teamwork
cards.body: We win, lose, and grow together. No player left on the sideline.

cards.title: Respect
cards.body: For teammates, opponents, referees, and the families that bring them.

cards.title: Inspire
cards.body: Coaches who care, players who try — every session, every match.

blocks.title: From the touchline.
blocks.body: Match reports, club news, and updates from around HPFC.

blocks.title: Two grounds, easy to find.
blocks.body: Heyford Park and Fritwell Field — full addresses, parking, and maps on the locations page.

cards.title: First Aid
cards.body: First aid at training and matches

blocks.title: Powered by our sponsors.
blocks.body: Every team at Heyford Park FC is backed by a local business. Their support pays for kit, equipment, and pitch time — and we're grateful for every one.

blocks.title: Got a question?
blocks.body: We'll point you to the right person — joining, sponsorship, welfare, or just hello.

title: About
seoDescription: About Heyford Park FC — a volunteer-run, England Football accredited youth club founded in 2019.

blocks.title: A volunteer-run club, built for our community.
blocks.description: Heyford Park FC is run by parents and volunteers for the children of Heyford Park, Fritwell and the surrounding villages. Founded in 2019, accredited by England Football, and now home to 250+ players across 20 teams.

blocks.title: A community club for every child who wants to play.

children.text: Founded in 2019, Heyford Park FC has grown to over 250 registered players across 20 teams, boys' and girls' from U7 to U16. We're a volunteer-run, England Football accredited club rooted in Heyford Park — and we've built our coaching around three values that come before any scoreline.

blocks.title: From a handful of players to a club of hundreds.

items.title: Joined the Oxfordshire Football League
items.body: We enter our first league with 7 teams.

items.title: 1st kits launched
items.body: Our first set of club kits hits the pitch.

items.title: Rising Stars launched
items.body: Free football training for 4–7 year olds.

items.title: First U7s and 130+ children
items.body: More teams join, including our first U7s graduating from Rising Stars.

items.title: New kit
items.body: The teams get a fresh look.

items.title: £2,500 raised for charity
items.body: In collaboration with the Heyford Park Running Club, supporting Oxford Hospital Charity.

items.title: Floodlights at Fritwell Field
items.body: We invest in floodlights at our Fritwell ground.

items.title: Second FA star
items.body: Awarded our second star by the Football Association.

items.title: Rebrand to the Fighter Jets
items.body: New fighter jet logo and nickname, honouring the heritage of the old RAF grounds.

items.title: 10-year Fritwell Field partnership
items.body: We sign a long-term partnership with Fritwell Field.

items.title: Nike partner club
items.body: We become an official Nike partner club.

items.title: New Nike kits
items.body: Fresh Nike kits across the club.

items.title: Floodlights at Heyford Park
items.body: We invest in floodlights at Heyford Park.

items.title: 20 teams, 250+ children
items.body: The club today: 20 teams and over 250 children playing.

blocks.title: The volunteers who run the club.
blocks.body: Heyford Park FC is entirely volunteer-run. Meet the people who keep things ticking.

blocks.title: Want your child to join?
blocks.body: Find out who can play, when and where teams train, what it costs, and how to register — all in one place.

title: Join
seoDescription: Join Heyford Park FC — everything parents need to know before signing their child up.

blocks.title: Join Heyford Park FC
blocks.description: Four answers in one place: who can play, when and where teams train, what it costs, and how to register.

children.text: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
Age groups: U7, U8, U9, U10, U11, U12, U13, U14, U15, U16.
Team full? Join the waitlist. If your child's age group is at capacity, we'll add them to a waitlist and get in touch as soon as a place opens up.
Teams train weekly through the season at one of two grounds. Match days are Saturdays (younger teams) and Sundays (older teams).
Heyford Park — TBC. Fritwell Field — TBC. See full directions and parking on the Locations page.

title: Club Info
seoDescription: Heyford Park FC club information — welfare, first aid, downloadable documents, and sponsorship.

blocks.title: Everything else you might need.
blocks.description: Welfare, first aid, downloadable club documents, and sponsorship — all in one place.

children.text: The wellbeing of every child at Heyford Park FC comes before everything else. Our Child Welfare Officer, Faye Napper, is the first point of contact for any concern, supported by Assistant Child Welfare Officer Leah Barber.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
Email: welfare@heyfordparkfootballclub.co.uk
Every team has a first-aid trained coach present at every session and match. Each pitch is stocked with a kit including ice packs and dressings.
In an emergency please dial 999 first, then alert the nearest coach.

title: Locations
seoDescription: Find Heyford Park FC's grounds — Heyford Park, Fritwell Field and Tackley Pitch.

blocks.title: Find us on match day.
blocks.description: Tap any address to open it in your maps app. Teams aren't tied to a single ground — pitches are allocated week by week, so always check your team's WhatsApp group for the venue.

locations.name: Heyford Park
locations.address: Heyford Park School Specialisms Campus, Izzard Road, Heyford Park, Oxfordshire, OX26 5AB

locations.name: Fritwell Field
locations.address: Fewcott Road, Fritwell, Bicester, Oxfordshire, OX27 7QA

blocks.title: A few things to know before you arrive.

cards.title: Toilets
cards.body: Public toilets are available at Heyford Park. Limited facilities at Fritwell Field and Tackley — plan ahead.

cards.title: Smoke-free grounds
cards.body: All HPFC pitches are smoke-free. No smoking or vaping on or around the pitches please.

cards.title: No dogs
cards.body: For the safety of our players, dogs are not permitted on or around the pitches during matches or training.
